title: Swan Lake (Paris Opera Ballet 2026 - 2027)
synopsis:
Broadway Cinemas is proud to exclusively present the Paris Opera Ballet's spectacular 2026-2027 season! Kicking this season off are two world-renowned ballet classics coming straight to the big screen: Romeo and Juliet and Swan Lake.

 

Prince Siegfried is urged by his parents to choose a bride, but by the shores of a lake he meets a mysterious swan maiden, Odette, enchanted by the sorcerer Rothbart. Only a sincere vow can save her. Captivated, he swears eternal love, until he meets Odile, the black swan...

 

A magical ballet set to Tchaikovsky's sparkling music, Swan Lake was first created in 1877 for the Bolshoi Theatre in Moscow, later restaged by Marius Petipa and Lev Ivanov. Nearly a century later, Rudolf Nureyev brought his own interpretation to the Paris Opera in 1984.
cast: Sae Eun Park (Odette/Odile), Paul Marque (Prince Siegfried), Pablo Legasa (Rothbart), Premières Danseuses, Premiers Danseurs, Corps de Ballet  The Paris Opera Orchestra

cast_lang.en: Sae Eun Park (Odette/Odile), Paul Marque (Prince Siegfried), Pablo Legasa (Rothbart), Premières Danseuses, Premiers Danseurs, Corps de Ballet  The Paris Opera Orchestra
